title: The Bartered Bride
writer: Curt Alexander, Robert Vambery, Karel Sabina
actors: Max Nadler, Jarmila Novotna, Otto Wernicke
plot: Bohemia in the 19th century, stage-coach driver Hans, loves the mayor's daughter Marie, but she is promised Wenzel, the son of another wealthy farmer. Marie refuses to marry Wenzel because of Hans, but the marriage arranger tries ...
